name: StructureClaw: Traceable LLM Agents and an Executable Benchmark for Structural Engineering Workflows

description: arXiv:2607.14896v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Addressing a structural-engineering request requires more than a single answer; it requires a chain of interdependent artifacts: interpreted requirements, a computable model, validation records, solver outputs, code-check records, and a final report.
